data.exp_0_desc: Consulting for development and investment companies from Asia, especially China. Purchase of large construction machinery from China and the implementation of technologies for Slovak and foreign companies.
data.exp_1_desc: Investment Support Association SARIO under the Ministry of Economy of the Slovak Republic. Support for foreign investors in Slovakia.
data.exp_2_org: Embassy of Slovakia in China — Beijing
data.exp_2_desc: Innovation diplomat at the embassy in Beijing for MIRRI (Ministry of Investments, Regional Development and Informatization). Advisor to the Deputy Prime Minister of the Slovak Republic in China for VIP technologies.
data.exp_3_title: Director of the Foreign Trade Section
data.exp_3_org: SARIO — Ministry of Economy of the Slovak Republic — Bratislava
data.exp_3_desc: Slovak Investment and Trade Development Agency.
data.exp_4_desc: Commercial director of a construction company. Construction of investment complexes for foreign companies and company development strategy.
data.exp_5_desc: Manufacture and export of furniture and wood products across Asia and Europe.
data.exp_6_desc: Export and import of goods and technologies (China, Vietnam, Indonesia, Japan, USA, Germany, Russia, Austria, Netherlands).
data.exp_7_desc: Export of investment complexes and commercial commodities to countries in North Africa, Asia and Europe.
data.exp_8_org: Real Estate School for Business, Development and Construction — USA, Florida
